references.title: Ruflo (ruvnet/ruflo) — agent meta-harness
references.note: 63.9K stars, MIT. Multi-player agent swarms, self-learning memory, coordinated autonomous workflows over Claude Code/Codex. Referente de coordinacion multi-agente para /board work fleet.

references.title: wshobson/agents — multi-harness agentic plugin marketplace
references.note: 37.8K stars, MIT. Marketplace de plugins/subagentes multi-harness (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini). Peer directo de agentic-board; referente de como estructurar subagentes y coordinacion.

references.title: awesome-claude-code — curated Claude Code ecosystem
references.note: 49.7K stars. Coleccion curada de skills, subagentes, status lines, plugins y tooling de Claude Code. Fuente para descubrir patrones y herramientas del ecosistema.

references.title: CrewAI — role-playing autonomous agent orchestration
references.note: 55.3K stars, MIT. Framework para orquestar agentes autonomos con roles colaborativos. Referente de patrones de coordinacion (roles, tareas, delegacion) para el fleet de /board work.

references.title: Microsoft AutoGen — agentic AI programming framework
references.note: 59.6K stars, CC-BY-4.0. Framework de Microsoft para AI agentica multi-agente (conversaciones entre agentes, group chat). Referente de arquitectura de coordinacion.

references.title: Mermaid — diagram-as-code
references.note: Diagram-as-code. GitHub and Claude render fenced mermaid blocks natively — the plugin default, zero build step.

references.title: D2 (Terrastruct)
references.note: Cleaner architecture diagrams than Mermaid for dense graphs; needs external render (not inline on GitHub) — escalation target via Kroki.

references.title: Graphviz (DOT)
references.note: DOT language for large/dense dependency graphs; render via Kroki or the graphviz CLI. Escalation target when Mermaid gets illegible.

references.title: Kroki — universal diagram render
references.note: Renders Mermaid/D2/Graphviz/PlantUML to SVG/PNG via a URL — the render path when a diagram is not inline-native and must be embedded as an image.

references.title: Graphify (Graphify-Labs/graphify) — multi-modal knowledge graph
references.note: MIT, ~93K stars. Multi-modal knowledge-graph skill (code + docs + PDFs + SQL schemas); peer of CodeGraph, its graph.html is an auto-generated architecture visual. Sanitization: code parse is local but doc/PDF extraction uses an LLM backend and graph.json/html may embed secrets — never commit them, trusted backend only in private repos.

references.title: Power BI Agentic overview
references.note: Umbrella: curated bundle of agent skills + tools (powerbi-authoring plugin) that turns NL prompts into PBI semantic models and reports. Install seed for the BI toolkit.

references.title: Semantic model authoring skill
references.note: Agent skill: create/edit/deploy PBI semantic models (Import/DirectQuery/Direct Lake), DAX, relationships, refresh, AI-readiness. Routes to Modeling MCP first.

references.title: Power BI report authoring skill
references.note: Agent skill: create/edit/validate PBIR report definitions (pages, visuals, filters, themes). Writes the files; pairs with Desktop Bridge for reload+screenshot.

references.title: Power BI Report design skill
references.note: Agent skill: opinionated design guidance (archetypes, chart choice, color, typography, theme). Emits a YAML design brief; hands off to Report Authoring. Does NOT write PBIR.

references.title: Power BI Report planner and management skills
references.note: Planner orchestrates the design -> plan -> author -> publish pipeline; Management gets/publishes/manages reports in Fabric workspaces.

references.title: Power BI MCP servers (local + remote)
references.note: Tool: local Modeling MCP (@microsoft/powerbi-modeling-mcp, edits models in Desktop/Fabric/PBIP, runs DAX) and remote MCP (api.fabric.microsoft.com, query/insights, needs Entra OAuth).

references.title: Power BI Desktop Bridge (preview)
references.note: Tool: local server inside the PBI Desktop process (named pipe, JSON-RPC 2.0, local only) so agents reload models and capture screenshots for visual verification.

references.title: microsoft/skills-for-fabric - marketplace
references.note: MIT first-party marketplace of Fabric/PBI agent skills. Source of the powerbi-authoring plugin (bundles all skills above + registers the Modeling MCP). Cross-tool: Copilot CLI, VS Code, Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Windsurf.
